textbook_appendices_0035.title: Using Gates in QUBE Format
textbook_appendices_0035.summary: BODY: In `.qube` files, gates are listed declaratively in a circuit block. QUBE is optimized for symbolic reasoning and can be used as input to Mother's quantum reasoning layer. CODE: ``` circuit GHZ { qubits 3 H q0 CNOT q0 q1 CNOT q1 q2 measure_all } run GHZ shots=2048 ```
